name: Frosted Bath Caddy - Brightroom™
description:
Keep bath essentials neatly organized with this Frosted Bath Caddy from Brightroom™. Designed with a simple frosted look, this caddy features a top handle for easy carrying and two compartments to help separate shampoos, soaps and more. The open design makes it easy to grab what you need, while the versatile size works well for showers, tubs or bathroom counters.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
